arts.ttl: Florian Wirtz transfer news: Bayer Leverkusen star REJECTS Man Utd move
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen superstar Florian Wirtz has rejected a summer move to Manchester United, according to reports in Spain. However, the Red Devils have seen their first offer for Wirtz rejected by the Bayer Leverkusen midfielder, according to El Nacional .

arts.ttl: Man United want “extraordinary” player on Arsenal radar, set to scout him next week
arts.sum: Manchester United are lining up a summer move for the Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi. The 26-year-old central midfielder has been linked with a move to the Premier League in the past as well. Liverpool have failed to get a deal done for the Spanish international. He has been linked with Arsenal as well. According […] The post Man United want “extraordinary” player on Arsenal radar, set to scout him next week appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Napoli uninterested in Manchester United Osimhen offers
arts.sum: Napoli are uninterested in a potential player-plus-cash offer from Manchester United for Victor Osimhen, regardless of which players are proposed. Manchester United are among the clubs considering a summer deal for Osimhen, who is free to leave Napoli on a permanent basis. The Nigeria international is currently on loan at Galatasaray, where he has scored […] The post Napoli uninterested in Manchester United Osimhen offers first appeared on The Football Faithful.
